label: Kharion Prismworld
description: Kharion Prismworld is a faceted planet locked into Vesper Node’s tensile geometry, its limb resolving into crisp planes rather than a continuous curve. A shell of vitreous crust refracts the system’s stratified radiance into fixed meridian bands, producing enduring corridors of glare and intervals of absolute shadow. Along the equatorial line, fracture-belts expose dark crystalline strata arranged in rectilinear grids that mirror the polyhedral arcs of nearby planetoid orbits. The upper atmosphere forms thin, laminar sheets that shear cleanly along lattice-aligned fronts, rendering weather as stable, repeating patterns.
